parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.

simplesect.para: XUFSPSXC_SUCCESS, XUFSPSXC_FAILURE, UIC Error Codes in xufspsxc.h file.

briefdescription.para: This API Partially Initialize the UFS device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API read the UFS device information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API update the Logical Unit information structure by reading the configuration descriptor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API set the block size to 4K for Boot LUN.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, XUfsPsxc_UicCmd *UicCmdPtr, u32 Address, u32 Value)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_WritePhyReg

briefdescription.para: This API does PHY register write with the required sequence.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_UicCmd instance.
is Address of the PHy register.
is Value to be written to the PHY register.

briefdescription.para: This API does PHY register read with the required sequence.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_UicCmd instance.
is Address of the PHy register.
is a pointer to store the PHY register data.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API enable the MPHY and wait for Rx/Tx busy de-assertion.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, u32 SpeedGear, u32 RxTermCap, u32 TxTermCap)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_ConfigureTxRxAttributes

briefdescription.para: This API Configures the Tx/Rx Attributes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is the Power Mode value to be set.
is the Rx Termination Capability.
is the Tx Termination Capability.
